news.summary: A new OsteoStrong® center is set to open in Irving, Texas under the direction of Dr. Jeffrey Gladden, founder of Gladden Longevity. The center, a global leader in skeletal strength conditioning, is expanding its reach with this upcoming facility. The news was announced on May 9, 2025. This initiative signifies the company's commitment to promoting skeletal health and wellness. Dr. Gladden, a prominent figure in the field, will lead this new center, which will cater to the community in Irving and beyond. OsteoStrong® continues to drive impact, with this expansion being a testament to its dedication.
news.headline: OsteoStrong® opens new center in Irving, TX led by Dr. Jeffrey Gladden, renowned longevity expert. #SkeletalStrength #NewCenter #IrvingTexas

news.summary: NRG Energy, Inc. is scheduled to announce its first-quarter earnings on Monday, May 12. Analysts predict earnings to reach $1.67 per share, a significant rise from the 90 cents per share reported in the corresponding period last year. Recently, Jefferies analyst Julien Dumoulin-Smith reaffirmed a Buy rating for NRG Energy and increased the price target from $113 to $132 on May 5. The company currently offers an annual dividend yield of 1.46%, translating to a quarterly dividend of 44 cents per share ($1.76 annually). Investors considering potential gains from dividends may find NRG Energy an attractive option. Explore more details on the story at Benzinga.com.
news.headline: NRG Energy (NYSE: NRG) reports Q1 earnings on May 12, expected to be $1.67/share. Dividend yield at 1.46%, $1.76 yearly. Analysts see potential gains.

news.summary: SoundHound AI, a voice artificial intelligence solutions leader, demonstrated significant year-over-year growth propelled by its Polaris foundation model, despite missing revenue estimates. Q1 revenue surged by 151% to $29.1 million, falling short of the $30.38 million consensus. CEO Keyvan Mohajer highlighted the firm's robust underlying performance and successful investments. The growth was fueled by the Polaris model, featuring enhanced accuracy in noisy settings and extensive language support. Strategic acquisitions of SYNQ3, Amelia, and Allset also played a key role in driving performance. SoundHound's voice commerce initiative attracted interest from major automotive OEMs and restaurant chains.
news.headline: SoundHound AI showcased 151% YoY revenue growth to $29.1M in Q1, missing the $30.38M estimate. CEO attributes success to Polaris foundation model. Strategic acquisitions contribute to growth. CEO highlights success despite missing revenue estimate.

news.summary: TapSwap is a tap-to-earn Web3 application within Telegram, launched in mid-2024. It quickly gained popularity, amassing over 72 million users by early 2025, with 3 million daily active participants as of February. By mid-2024, it had over 59.7 million users, becoming the second-largest tap-to-earn platform after Hamster Kombat. TapSwap operates on The Open Network (TON) and is known for its tapping mechanics. It has plans to expand into a gaming ecosystem and attract third-party developers. Users earn TAPS tokens by tapping the screen, upgrading equipment, and completing tasks. The platform also offers daily codes, videos, and missions to maximize rewards. While legit, some concerns include an anonymous founding team and withdrawal delays. Future plans include transitioning to skill-based gaming, TAPS token listing and trading, staking mechanisms, improved user interface, community engagement, and developer engagement. TapSwap is evolving beyond casual tapping into a more comprehensive gaming hub within Web3.
news.headline: Is TapSwap a legit tap-to-earn game on Telegram with 72M users & 3M active players by Feb 2025? Now expanding into skill-based gaming & staking TAPS tokens post-Feb’25 launch. Be cautious & follow latest updates for true experience.

news.summary: Gemini, a cryptocurrency exchange founded by the Winklevoss twins, has received regulatory approval from the Malta Financial Services Authority to expand crypto derivatives trading in Europe. With a Markets in Financial Instruments Directive II (MiFID II) license issued on May 8, 2025, Gemini can now offer regulated derivatives throughout the EU and EEA. This approval is a significant milestone for Gemini's European expansion, allowing them to provide derivatives to retail and institutional users. Gemini's offerings in the EU and EEA will include perpetual futures and other derivatives for advanced traders. This move aligns with the growing trend of derivatives in the crypto industry, especially noticeable with Coinbase's recent acquisition of Deribit and Kraken's plans to purchase NinjaTrader for futures trading. Gemini's MiCA license is still pending as of May 2025.
news.headline: Gemini set to launch crypto derivatives in Europe with MiFID II license from MFSA for EU trading, aiming to offer perpetual futures to advanced users. Gemini's Maltese entity secured license on May 8, 2025. Gemini aims to meet MiCA requirements for full licensing. Derivatives market in crypto industry sees significant growth with Coinbase acquiring Deribit for $2.9 billion and Kraken buying NinjaTrader for $1.5 billion.
WH Sr. Adviser Hassett: We will know more on China tariff after talks in Geneva.

news.summary: In Singapore on May 9, 2025, ONE.io, a prominent global provider of payments and digital assets solutions, announced a collaboration with BoomFi to introduce ONE Gateway. This innovative partnership will integrate crypto payment features into ONE.io's offerings, allowing their clients to accept digital asset payments efficiently.
news.headline: ONE.io partners with BoomFi to launch ONE Gateway, seamlessly integrating crypto payments. Singapore, May 9, 2025.

The company, known as U.S. Gold or simply "we," reported these developments after trading on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol USAU. news.summary: Two papers recently presented by Verseon introduce innovative methods in data analysis. The first paper addresses strategies to address missing or imperfect data, while the second paper discusses Verseon's AutoESSV technique, which combines multiple AI models to improve predictive accuracy. The papers were presented in Fremont, California on May 9, 2025.
news.headline: Verseon presents 2 AI innovations at 2025 IEEE Conference: new data compensation method and AutoESSV method for enhanced predictive accuracy.

news.summary: In Las Vegas on May 9, 2025, a well-known martial arts guru and leader in personal development, Scott Bolan, revealed the launch of his highly-regarded books, including "Become Unstoppable." Bolan is recognized for his life-changing training programs and captivating speeches.
news.headline: Renowned martial arts expert Scott Bolan releases successful books on Amazon and Kindle.

news.summary: TaskUs, Inc., a prominent provider of outsourced digital services and customer experience, revealed its first-quarter results for the period ending March 31, 2025. The company reported total revenues of $277.8 million, reflecting a significant 22.1% increase compared to the previous year. This exceeded the upper limit of their guidance by $5.8 million. Net income for the quarter amounted to $21.1 million, with a net income margin of 7.6%. Additionally, the company reported an Adjusted Net Income of $35.9 million. TaskUs operates under the Nasdaq symbol TASK.
news.headline: TaskUs reports Q1 2025 earnings: Total revenues $277.8M (22.1% YoY), net income $21.1M, adjusted net income $35.9M.

news.summary: Shares of Toast are soaring as the company experiences robust business trends, despite falling short of Q1 expectations for its restaurant software. The stock is breaking out amid positive performance, indicating the market's optimism.

news.summary: LSB Industries, Inc. disclosed that their Vice President of Clean Energy, Jakob Krummenacher, will attend the UBS Energy Transition and Decarbonization Conference in New York City on May 14th. news.headline: LSB Industries to participate in UBS Energy Transition and Decarbonization Conference on May 14th in New York City. Vice President of Clean Energy, Jakob Krummenacher, to join with one-on-one meetings and panel discussion. VP available all day for meetings.

news.summary: PHX Minerals Inc. (PHX) shares are seeing a rise in premarket trading as it announces its acquisition by WhiteHawk Income Corporation in an all-cash deal valued at $4.35 per share, totaling around $187 million, inclusive of PHX's net debt. Under the agreement, PHX shareholders will get $4.35 in cash for each common stock share, excluding interest and tax withholding. This represents a 21.8% premium over PHX's closing price on May 7, 2025. The cash offer is also 15.7% higher than PHX's 30-day volume-weighted average share price.
news.headline: PHX Minerals acquired by WhiteHawk for $187 million at $4.35 per share, representing 21.8% premium over closing price.

news.summary: During the Annual General Meeting held on May 9, 2025, Norsk Hydro ASA ("Hydro") appointed Kim Wahl as a new member of the Board of Directors. Wahl's election aligns with the Nomination Committee's suggestion released on April 14, 2025. Wahl will serve for a maximum of two years, concluding at Hydro's Annual General Meeting in 2027.
news.headline: Norsk Hydro appoints Kim Wahl to Board of Directors for up to two years from Annual General Meeting 2025.

news.summary: A coworking company operated by its members is set to launch its seventh location in Chicago, specifically in the Loop area. The announcement was made on May 9, 2025, by the company, marking a significant milestone for them in expanding their footprint.
news.headline: Workbox announces plan to open its largest U.S. location in the Loop at Civic Opera Building in Chicago.

news.summary: RB Global, Inc. revealed that Ritchie Bros. Auctioneers, a leading marketplace for commercial assets, successfully auctioned off over 11,000 equipment items, trucks, and vehicles at a recent event in Edmonton, AB. The five-day auction, held from April 29 to May 3, 2025, resulted in a gross transaction value (GTV) of nearly CA$225 million. The event took place online and on-site, marking a significant success for the company.
news.headline: Ritchie Bros. sells CA$224+ million of heavy equipment assets and vehicles at a premier Canadian auction event, including 11,000+ items.

news.summary: Standard Lithium Ltd. reported its financial and operating results for the three-month fiscal period ending March 31, 2025. The company received a $225 million grant from the US Department of Energy, finalized a pilot field test in South West Arkansas, and expanded its leasehold footprint in East Texas. The South West Arkansas project was designated a priority transparency critical mineral project by the Trump administration. A brine production unit, the Reynolds Unit, was approved for Phase I of the SWA Project. These achievements are expected to deliver significant value to shareholders and help secure critical mineral production in the US. The company is focused on further project development milestones.
news.headline: Standard Lithium reported strong Q1 results for fiscal year 2025, receiving a $225 million grant from the US Department of Energy, progressing with reservoir testing, and finalizing derisking of DLE technology. SWA Project was designated as a priority transparency critical mineral project, with the brine production unit approved. SWA Project received special designation and approval of the brine production unit. Total mention of funds was of $225 million from the grant.

news.summary: TAMPA, Florida, May 09, 2025 - SRx Health Solutions, Inc. revealed its recent investment move in the cryptocurrency market by acquiring Solana Tokens (SOL) valued at around $1.5 million. The decision is in line with the Company's new asset diversification plan to invest up to 10% of forthcoming cash flows and reserves in digital currencies and precious metals like Bitcoin (BTC), Solana (SOL), physical gold, and silver. SRx Health Solutions, Inc., operating as a prominent global health and wellness entity, has solidified its commitment to exploring alternative investment avenues amidst the changing financial landscape.
news.headline: SRx Health Solutions buys $1.5M in Solana Tokens for diversification strategy, allocating 10% into crypto and metals.

The pharmaceutical sector has shown a notable uptick in the adoption of AI technology in recent years, contributing to the market's expansion.

news.summary: Atlanta-based company Corpay, Inc. (NYSE: CPAY), a prominent player in corporate payments globally, revealed that it is set to take part in upcoming investor conferences. Specifically, on Tuesday, May 20, 2025, the company will be present at the 15th Annual Barclays Emerging Payments and FinTech Forum in New York, NY. Senior management will engage in a fireside chat starting at 8:00 AM Eastern Time. news.summary: TaskUs, a top provider of outsourced digital services and next-gen customer experience, based in New Braunfels, Texas, disclosed today its move to transition into a privately held company. This decision comes after reaching a definitive agreement, involving an affiliate of Blackstone, TaskUs Co-Founder and CEO Bryce Maddock, and TaskUs Co-Founder and President Jaspar Weir. TaskUs is listed as (Nasdaq: TASK) and caters to pioneering businesses worldwide. The shift to private status marks a significant change in the company's ownership structure, signaling a new phase for TaskUs.
news.headline: TaskUs, Inc. (Nasdaq: TASK) will go private in a deal led by co-founders and Blackstone amid digital service success.

news.summary: In Miami, Fibernow, a prominent provider of fiber-based broadband, cloud-based video, and digital voice services, has finalized the acquisition of Wavetechs, a boutique Managed Service Provider (MSP) recognized for its personalized service and strong ties with small business customers. The acquisition was completed in the first quarter of this year, encompassing Wavetechs' entire staff, exclusive product offerings, and client portfolio. Wavetechs will undergo a seamless integration into the Fibernow Business division, enhancing its service offerings.
news.headline: Fibernow acquires Wavetechs, adding robust IT services. Acquisition closed in Q1, including team and customer base.

news.summary: In Hollywood, Florida, at FICO World 25, a renowned analytics software provider, FICO, declared the recipients of the FICO Partner Awards during its annual conference. This prestigious recognition celebrates six firms that have demonstrated exceptional value to their corporate clients by leveraging the FICO Platform. The recipients were acknowledged for their dedication, creativity, and strategic foresight in driving success for their clients. For further details, visit the partner portal on FICO's website. Alexandre Graff expressed admiration for partners' ongoing dedication, innovative approaches, and forward-thinking perspectives.
news.headline: FICO Awards 6 Partners at FICO World 25 for delivering value with FICO Platform. Visit https://www.fico.com/en/partner-portal

news.summary: Crypto markets are witnessing a rally for the second consecutive day, buoyed by positive global trade prospects and optimistic market sentiment. Experts caution investors against FOMO, recommending strategic approaches. Key price gains in various cryptocurrencies include: Bitcoin ($103,120.94, +3.6%), Ethereum ($2,350.17, +20.4%), Solana ($173.61, +12.8%), XRP ($2.40, +9%), Dogecoin ($0.2087, +14%), and Shiba Inu ($0.00001525, +13.8%). Significant stats reveal Bitcoin saw a 3.8% increase in large transaction volume and 1.2% rise in daily active addresses, with transactions over $100,000 jumping from 10,628 to 14,818. Notably, 99% of BTC holders are profitable. Coinglass data notes 249,335 traders were liquidated within 24 hours for $1.14 billion, with short liquidations on May 8 hitting $394 million, indicating forced closures amid price surges. Santiment data indicates a rise in new Bitcoin wallet creations.
news.headline: Cryptocurrencies surge led by Ethereum at +20.4% gain, warnings against FOMO. BTC holder profits at 99%, $1.14B liquidated.

An exploit temporarily disrupted activities on its ZeUSD platform. Rather than remaining inactive, the team promptly addressed the issue with openness and promptness, ...
news.headline: Zoth, a growing RWA tokenization protocol, progresses after disruption, focusing on security and scalability.

news.summary: A recent report highlights the critical need for maintaining continuity of support and attracting new service members to ensure military readiness and national security. The study, released in Lorton, Virginia on May 9, 2025, emphasizes the importance of these actions in safeguarding the country. The National Military Spouse Network (NMSN), a leading organization in this area, is actively involved in addressing this issue to guarantee the welfare of our armed forces. This underscores the significance of retaining experienced personnel and recruiting the next generation of service members. These efforts are crucial in enhancing overall military capabilities and protecting national interests effectively.
news.headline: NMSN releases white paper on military spouse transitions supporting veterans, emphasizing continuity and attracting new service members.
